description: Duck Life 4 is the fourth installment in the popular Duck Life series. Train and race your duck around the globe and become the champion!

1.0.0.description:
Find the setup guide and general information [here](https://github.com/spencer2585/Duck-Life-4-Archipelago/blob/main/README.md)  
This randomizer is designed to support the remake of Duck Life 4 **Not the classic version**. you can find the link to the steam page [here](https://store.steampowered.com/app/1461200/Duck_Life_4/)  
## Whats included
### Items
- Skill Levels
- Tournament Tickets
- Keys  
  
### Locations
- Training Skills
- Winning Races
  
### Options
- Skill Level Size: This determines how many skill levels you get per item and how many levels you need to train to send an item
- XP Multiplier: Multiplies how much XP you get by training, can go up to 16x
1.0.0.title: Duck Life 4 Archipelago 1.0 Release

1.0.0_HF1.description:
## Bug Fixes
- Fixed generation bug with city tournament races not requiring the city tournament ticket

(This does not contain any mod changes. if you already have the mod installed you only need to update the APworld)
1.0.0_HF1.title: Duck Life 4 Archipelago 1.0.0 Hotfix 1
